overview.description: The WealthTrust DBS Long Term Growth ETF (WLTG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund allocates its exposure between equity and tactical defensive sleeves utilizing a trend analysis model and quantitative process. The fund is actively managed. WLTG was launched on Dec 5, 2021 and is issued by WealthTrust.
